data.name: LegalTerms.Section1.Body
data.value: Open Jam is a marketplace platform for creators to list and sell digital works (music, images, ebooks, etc.). By creating an account or using the service, you agree to the following terms.

data.name: LegalTerms.Section2.Body
data.value: You must be at least 13 years old to register. You are responsible for your account activity and password security, and you agree to provide accurate registration information.

data.name: LegalTerms.Section3.Body
data.value: All works you list must be owned by you or properly licensed. The following types of content are strictly prohibited:

data.name: LegalTerms.Section3.Item1
data.value: Content that infringes on intellectual property rights

data.name: LegalTerms.Section3.Item3
data.value: Content that violates local laws or community guidelines

data.name: LegalTerms.Section4.Body
data.value: Open Jam has no monthly fees. A 3% commission is charged on each successful sale. Payouts are made according to the settlement schedule to your linked payout account.

data.name: LegalTerms.Section5.Body
data.value: You retain full copyright of your works. To display and sell on the platform, you grant Open Jam a non-exclusive, worldwide license to host, display, and promote your works.

data.name: LegalTerms.Section6.Body
data.value: If you violate these terms, we have the right to suspend or terminate your account. You may also delete your account at any time in your settings.

data.name: LegalPrivacy.Section1.Body
data.value: This policy explains how Open Jam collects, uses, and protects your personal data. By using the service, you understand and agree to the practices described here.

data.name: LegalPrivacy.Section2.Body
data.value: To provide our services, we collect the following information:

data.name: LegalPrivacy.Section2.Item2
data.value: Transaction data: purchase and sales records, payout account

data.name: LegalPrivacy.Section2.Item3
data.value: Usage data: device, browser, and interaction logs

data.name: LegalPrivacy.Section3.Body
data.value: We use your data to operate the platform, process transactions, provide customer support, and — with your consent — send product updates and marketing communications.

data.name: LegalPrivacy.Section4.Body
data.value: We do not sell your personal data. It is only shared with necessary third-party services for payment processing, legal requirements, or when authorized by you.

data.name: LegalPrivacy.Section5.Body
data.value: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your password and sensitive data, and we regularly review our security measures. However, no system can guarantee 100% security.

data.name: LegalPrivacy.Section6.Body
data.value: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, and you may unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time. Requests can be handled through your settings or by contacting support.
